description: Personal blog of Glasha Zhur. Accessibility specialist from Bilbao. Documenting semantic web design, vanilla CSS, and digital inclusivity.

author.bio: Digital accessibility specialist and front-end enthusiast from Bilbao. Passionate about semantic markup, vanilla web techniques, and ensuring the web is usable for everyone.
